synced:
[00:13.46] Yeah, breakfast at Tiffany's and bottles of bubbles
[00:17.18] Girls with tattoos who like getting in trouble
[00:20.76] Lashes and diamonds, ATM machines
[00:23.95] Buy myself all of my favorite things (yeah)
[00:27.53] Been through some bad shit, I should be a sad bitch
[00:30.84] Who woulda thought it'd turn me to a savage?
[00:34.40] Rather be tied up with calls and not strings
[00:37.88] Write my own checks like I write what I sing, yeah
[00:41.14] My wrist, stop watchin', my neck is flossy
[00:44.39] Make big deposits, my gloss is poppin'
[00:47.73] You like my hair? Gee, thanks, just bought it
[00:51.38] I see it, I like it, I want it, I got it, yeah
[00:54.81] I want it, I got it, I want it, I got it
[00:58.06] I want it, I got it, I want it, I got it
[01:01.55] You like my hair? Gee, thanks, just bought it
[01:05.06] I see it, I like it, I want it, I got it (yep)
[01:08.52] Wearing a ring, but ain't gon' be no "Mrs."
[01:11.95] Bought matching diamonds for six of my bitches
[01:15.43] I'd rather spoil all my friends with my riches
[01:18.72] Think retail therapy my new addiction
[01:22.24] Whoever said money can't solve your problems
[01:25.80] Must not have had enough money to solve 'em
[01:29.00] They say, "Which one?", I say, "Nah, I want all of 'em"
[01:32.51] Happiness is the same price as red-bottoms
[01:35.82] My smile is beamin' (yeah), my skin is gleamin' (is gleamin')
[01:39.43] The way it shine, I know you've seen it (you've seen it)
[01:42.89] I bought a crib just for (just for) the closet (closet)
[01:46.28] Both his and hers, I want it, I got it, yeah
[01:49.57] I want it, I got it, I want it, I got it
[01:52.95] I want it, I got it, I want it, I got it (baby)
[01:56.50] You like my hair? Gee, thanks, just bought it (oh, yeah)
[02:00.03] I see it, I like it, I want it, I got it, yeah
[02:02.64] Yeah, my receipts be lookin' like phone numbers
[02:05.26] If it ain't money, then wrong number
[02:07.09] Black card is my business card
[02:08.58] The way it be settin' the tone for me
[02:10.30] I don't mean to brag, but I be like, "Put it in the bag," yeah
[02:13.99] When you see them racks, they stacked up like my ass, yeah
[02:17.17] Shoot, go from the store to the booth
[02:19.04] Make it all back in one loop, give me the loot
[02:21.09] Never mind, I got the juice
[02:22.49] Nothing but net when we shoot
[02:23.73] Look at my neck, look at my jet
[02:25.20] Ain't got enough money to pay me respect
[02:27.16] Ain't no budget when I'm on the set
[02:28.99] If I like it, then that's what I get, yeah
[02:30.77] I want it, I got it, I want it, I got it (yeah)
[02:34.19] I want it, I got it, I want it, I got it (oh, yeah, yeah)
[02:37.64] You like my hair? Gee, thanks, just bought it
[02:41.00] I see it, I like it, I want it, I got it (yep)
[02:43.81]
